hooks.command: PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$(go env GOPATH 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH"; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) if command -v goimports >/dev/null 2>&1; then goimports -w "$f"; elif command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$f"; fi ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
